prose.en: The cloud service provider defines, documents and implements a procedure for the decommissioning of hardware used to operate system components supporting the cloud service production, development, test or staging environment under the responsibility of the cloud service provider. As part of this procedure, approval by authorised personnel of the cloud service provider based on the applicable policies is required.

guidance.en: This criterion is not applicable for hardware components that do not store cloud service customer data, cloud service derived data, cloud service provider data or account data (e.g. monitors, routers or keyboards).
